title: SourceSnapshot
description: Reference-only record of a customer repository/source intake snapshot. Never carries source content or file listings — customer-proprietary highest sensitivity, ref+hash only.
$comment: compat_class: closed. Authority: approved plan §2 domain row 3 (docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2, §5); docs/architecture/contract-catalog.md P0 table 'SourceSnapshot' row (Owner repository-intake, Idempotency key 'repo SHA (content hash)', Sensitivity 'customer-proprietary 최고', Retention 'per-run workspace+TTL; 중앙 보존은 customer policy, hash만 ledger'). content_hash is the sole ledger anchor per contract-catalog.md:25 ('hash만 ledger') — no raw content, no file paths, no directory listing field exists anywhere in this schema by design (k3s spec §4.1 is ref-only for repository intake; paths themselves are treated as customer-proprietary, matching PatchArtifact.changed_files' 'paths only never content' constraint).

tenant_id.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 3 field list.

run_id.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 3 field list.

repo_commit.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 3 field list.

content_hash.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 3 field list, explicit $comment: idempotency key + sole ledger anchor — docs/architecture/contract-catalog.md:25 ('Idempotency key: repo SHA (content hash)') and 'hash만 ledger' retention note.

snapshot_uri.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 3 field list — 'uri 패턴 R9'. Ruling R9-5 (Security MUST-FIX, docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §1.1): query/fragment forbidden on uri_ref to defend against presigned-token smuggling; docs/architecture/security-model.md 감사·합성 반영 hardening list.

source_type.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 3 field list.

sbom_uri.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 3 field list; ADR-0021 (SBOM + dependency policy) intake anchor.

secret_scan_status.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 3 field list. A 'failed' value is a schema-VALID instance — this schema does not itself block anything; blocking on secret-scan failure is an Input Gate RUNTIME behavior (Algorithm §5.4 Input Gate: 'secrets scan ... 실패 시 run 격리·중단'), enforced at W2B, not at the schema layer.

captured_at.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 3 field list.
